findings.location: s1 — サーバ起動時の警告ログについて
findings.description: The source explicitly states that while the connection pool has not been created, the metric value will be `NaN` (「コネクションプールが生成されていない間、メトリクスの値は `NaN` となる」), including a log output example showing `value=NaN`. This behavior is omitted from the knowledge file. Users may ask why their metrics show NaN at startup and the knowledge file cannot answer correctly without this.
findings.source_evidence: 「なお、コネクションプールが生成されていない間、メトリクスの値は `NaN` となる。」および対応するログ出力例 `db.pool.active{} value=NaN`

findings.description: `BasicApplicationInitializer` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the XML component definition example (`nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer`) but is absent from the hints array.
